hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Describing your workplace with there is / there are -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 4 -- My Office & My Tools -- Describing My Workplace
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 4 -- My Office & My Tools

listenings.text: Welcome to our office on the fifth floor! Let me show you around. When you come in, there is a big reception desk in front of you. The data team sits on the left, next to the windows. There are two desks for our team, and there is a new laptop on each desk. Behind the desks, there is a tall shelf with books and folders. The meeting room is on the right, between the kitchen and my office. There is a large screen and a whiteboard in the meeting room. We draw our plans on the whiteboard every Monday morning. The kitchen is at the end of the hall, and there is always fresh coffee there. I hope you like your new workplace!
